title: May Pen Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting May Pen with a Z-Score of +3.86. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in May Pen has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 56%, and the wind speed is 16.7 km/h, which may provide some relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat. 
 The impact of this heat wave will be significant, with potential damage to crops and infrastructure, as well as increased energy consumption.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
